[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10001110 4
1 00111100 4
2 11001111 6
3 00000000 a
4 01110001 4
5 00001110 3
6 10100111 5
7 10011110 5

01 10 10101001 4
12 21 00111001 4
23 32 01010001 3
34 43 11110011 6
45 54 11110011 6
56 65 11001111 6 match 2
67 76 01110001 4 match 4
70 07 01111111 7

02 20 10010000 2
13 31 01101000 3
24 42 10100010 3
35 53 00000000 a match 3
46 64 00111100 4 match 1
57 75 10111110 6
60 06 00001110 3 match 5
71 17 11010110 5

03 30 11000001 3
14 41 10011011 5
25 52 01010001 3
36 63 11001111 6 match 2
47 74 01001101 4
50 05 11000001 3
61 16 10100111 5 match 6
72 27 11101111 7

15 51 01101000 3
26 62 10011110 5 match 7
37 73 10111110 6
